---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a Quota Capsule feature or product change
title: "Feature: "
labels: enhancement
---

## User problem

What user problem would this solve?

## Proposed behavior

What should Quota Capsule do?

## Product layer

- [ ] Default capsule layer
- [ ] Explanation layer
- [ ] History layer
- [ ] Settings layer
- [ ] Advanced layer
- [ ] Sensitive layer: account, session, auth, config

## Why now?

Why should this be added in the current version?

## Privacy and safety

Does this read, store, upload, or infer any user data? Do not include tokens, cookies, auth files, prompt text, or session text.

## Alternatives

What simpler version or non-feature solution should be considered?
